prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: a simple stock picker box unfolds into many connected requirement cards: "数据", "策略", "回测", "可视化", "报告", "大模型", "图表". Avilia tries to hold the expanding chain with a red ribbon.

Core meaning: a simple stock selector naturally expands into an almost endless system of connected problems.

Style: playful Chinese technical blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white, small blue system nodes. Minimal labels: "没完没了", "范围膨胀", "apeiria".

Avoid cluttered requirements board, avoid corporate roadmap style.
